name: tse-jira
description: TSE-focused Jira ticket creation for Redis Technical Support Engineers. Three slash commands — /tse-jira:bug (Bug Jiras from Zendesk PDFs), /tse-jira:rca (multi-cluster RCA Jiras from Zendesk+Jira PDFs), /tse-jira:score (8-130 impact score). Dry-run by default with HTML + markdown preview. Multi-project (RED/MOD/DOC/RDSC/RCA), sprint-blank, uses the claude.ai Atlassian MCP.
